mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO video_danmaku (danmaku_id, task_id, bvid, content, dm_time, appear_time, normalized_content, text_type, sentiment_score, sentiment_label, sentiment_confidence, sentiment_intensity, sentiment_source, sentiment_version, emotion_tags_json) VALUES
(#{danmaku.danmakuId}, #{danmaku.taskId}, #{danmaku.bvid}, #{danmaku.content}, #{danmaku.dmTime}, #{danmaku.dmTime}, #{danmaku.normalizedContent}, #{danmaku.textType}, #{danmaku.sentimentScore}, #{danmaku.sentimentLabel}, #{danmaku.sentimentConfidence}, #{danmaku.sentimentIntensity}, #{danmaku.sentimentSource}, #{danmaku.sentimentVersion}, #{danmaku.emotionTagsJson})
mapper.select: SELECT danmaku_id AS danmakuId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, content, dm_time AS dmTime, appear_time AS appearTime, normalized_content AS normalizedContent, text_type AS textType, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel, sentiment_confidence AS sentimentConfidence, sentiment_intensity AS sentimentIntensity, sentiment_source AS sentimentSource, sentiment_version AS sentimentVersion, emotion_tags_json AS emotionTagsJson FROM video_danmaku WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY dm_time ASC

SELECT danmaku_id AS danmakuId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, content, dm_time AS dmTime, appear_time AS appearTime, normalized_content AS normalizedContent, text_type AS textType, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel, sentiment_confidence AS sentimentConfidence, sentiment_intensity AS sentimentIntensity, sentiment_source AS sentimentSource, sentiment_version AS sentimentVersion, emotion_tags_json AS emotionTagsJson FROM video_danmaku WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND sentiment_label = #{sentimentLabel} ORDER BY dm_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_danmaku WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
